name: lmstudio-copilot-provider
description: Use local LM Studio models inside VS Code Copilot Chat with streaming, tool calling, and optional image generation.

lmstudio-copilot.apiKey.description: API key for LM Studio server authentication

lmstudio-copilot.autoRefreshModels.description: Automatically refresh available models on startup using both the LM Studio CLI and the local server

lmstudio-copilot.cliPath.description: Path to the LM Studio CLI. The extension uses this to discover installed models, auto-start the server, and lazy-load models on first use.

lmstudio-copilot.launchCommand.description: Fallback command to launch LM Studio in a VS Code terminal when the LM Studio CLI is unavailable

lmstudio-copilot.terminalName.description: Name of the integrated terminal used only when launchCommand fallback is needed

lmstudio-copilot.autoStartServer.description: Automatically ensure the LM Studio daemon and local server are running when the extension starts

lmstudio-copilot.enableTerminalTool.description: Allow LM Studio model tool calls to run commands in VS Code integrated terminal

lmstudio-copilot.terminalToolName.description: Integrated terminal name used by model tool commands

lmstudio-copilot.terminalToolTimeout.description: Timeout in milliseconds for model-invoked terminal commands

lmstudio-copilot.startupWaitMs.description: Milliseconds to wait before checking LM Studio connection after server start

lmstudio-copilot.maxInputTokens.description: Maximum input tokens (context window size). Default is 128k.

lmstudio-copilot.maxTools.description: Maximum number of tools to send to the model per request. Local models struggle with many tools (86+ is common with MCP servers). Tools used in the current conversation are always included; the rest are prioritized by name simplicity. Set to 0 for no limit.

lmstudio-copilot.enableToolCalling.description: Enable tool calling support for models that support it (e.g., Qwen, Llama 3.1+, Mistral).

lmstudio-copilot.injectSystemPrompt.description: Prepend a system message with coding-assistant instructions. Disable if your LM Studio chat template already includes system instructions.

lmstudio-copilot.enableThinking.description: Allow models to use extended thinking / chain-of-thought (enable_thinking parameter). Disable for models that produce noisy <think> blocks or error on the parameter.

enumDescriptions: Do not send a reasoning_effort parameter — the model uses its built-in default.
Minimal reasoning trace. Faster responses, lower token usage.
Balanced reasoning. Good for most tasks.
Maximum reasoning depth. Best for complex problems, uses more tokens.
lmstudio-copilot.reasoningEffort.description: Reasoning effort level sent to models that support the reasoning_effort parameter (e.g. o1, o3, QwQ). Has no effect on models that do not support the parameter.

lmstudio-copilot.imageGenBackend.description: Image generation backend. 'dalle' = OpenAI DALL-E compatible API (also works with LM Studio image models). 'a1111' = Automatic1111 / Stable Diffusion Web UI.

lmstudio-copilot.imageGenEndpointUrl.description: Base URL for the image generation server. LM Studio does NOT have an image generation endpoint — leave blank to see setup instructions. For DALL-E (OpenAI): https://api.openai.com. For A1111/Stable Diffusion: typically http://localhost:7860.

lmstudio-copilot.imageGenApiKey.description: API key for the image generation backend. Use this for OpenAI DALL-E or another OpenAI-compatible image API. This key is separate from the LM Studio chat API key.

lmstudio-copilot.imageGenModel.description: Image model to use for DALL-E backend (e.g. dall-e-3, dall-e-2).

lmstudio-copilot.imageGenSteps.description: Default number of diffusion steps (A1111 backend only).

lmstudio-copilot.imageGenOutputDir.description: Directory to save generated images. Workspace-relative or absolute. Defaults to 'generated-images/' inside the workspace.

commands.title: LM Studio: Start Server in Integrated Terminal

languageModelTools.name: lmstudio_run_in_terminal
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Executes a shell command in VS Code integrated terminal and returns its full stdout, stderr, and exit code. Use for build, test, install, lint, and diagnostics commands.
languageModelTools.userDescription: Runs a shell command and returns the output to the model.

cwd.description: Working directory (absolute or workspace-relative). Defaults to workspace root.

languageModelTools.name: lmstudio_read_file
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Reads the contents of a file from disk and returns them with line numbers. Accepts workspace-relative or absolute paths. Optionally specify a line range.
languageModelTools.userDescription: Reads a file and returns its contents to the model.

startLine.description: First line to read (1-based, inclusive). Omit for beginning of file.

endLine.description: Last line to read (1-based, inclusive). Omit for end of file.

languageModelTools.name: lmstudio_write_file
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Writes or overwrites a file on disk with the provided content. Creates parent directories if needed. Use when you want to create or modify a file.
languageModelTools.userDescription: Writes content to a file on disk.

content.description: Full content to write to the file

createDirectories.description: Create parent directories if they don't exist. Defaults to true.

languageModelTools.name: lmstudio_list_directory
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Lists the contents of a directory. Returns files and folders with icons. Can recurse into subdirectories up to a configurable depth. Skips node_modules, .git, dist etc.
languageModelTools.userDescription: Lists files and folders in a directory.

path.description: Directory path (absolute or workspace-relative). Defaults to workspace root.

recursive.description: Recurse into subdirectories. Defaults to false.

maxDepth.description: Maximum recursion depth when recursive is true. Defaults to 4.

languageModelTools.name: lmstudio_search_files
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Searches for a text pattern or regex across all files in the workspace. Returns matching lines with file path, line number, and surrounding context. Uses ripgrep when available for speed.
languageModelTools.userDescription: Searches for text or patterns across workspace files.

pattern.description: Text or regex pattern to search for

glob.description: Glob pattern to restrict which files are searched (e.g. '**/*.ts')

isRegex.description: Treat pattern as a regular expression. Defaults to false.

maxResults.description: Maximum number of matches to return. Defaults to 50.

contextLines.description: Number of context lines to show around each match. Defaults to 2.

languageModelTools.name: lmstudio_generate_image
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Generates an image from a text prompt using a configured image generation backend (DALL-E compatible API or Automatic1111 Stable Diffusion). Saves the image to disk and displays it inline in chat. Supports optional negative prompt, dimensions, and output path.
languageModelTools.userDescription: Generates an image from a text description.

prompt.description: Text description of the image to generate

negativePrompt.description: Things to exclude from the image (A1111 backend only)

width.description: Image width in pixels. Defaults to lmstudio-copilot.imageGenWidth setting.

height.description: Image height in pixels. Defaults to lmstudio-copilot.imageGenHeight setting.

steps.description: Diffusion steps (A1111 backend only). Defaults to lmstudio-copilot.imageGenSteps setting.

savePath.description: Workspace-relative or absolute path to save the image. Defaults to generated-images/<timestamp>.png.
